name: prompt-booster
description: Developer-focused prompt optimization plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Optimize vague development requests into structured prompts.
interface.longDescription: Prompt Booster analyzes developer requests, applies reusable prompt patterns, scores prompt quality, and returns structured Codex-ready prompt output.
defaultPrompt: JWT 로그인 만들어줘 요청을 Codex용 프롬프트로 최적화해줘.
RAG 챗봇 구현 요청의 누락된 요구사항을 분석해줘.
